donation_decision:
Through your efforts in the Pro-Democratic Donation Task, you generated a total of $0.20 across all the organizations you worked for.



You can now decide to either donate all of this money to Vote.org, a non-partisan organization that helps hundreds of voters across the USA register, make voting plans, understand their ballot, and show up to the polls, or you can keep the money for yourself as additional compensation (bonus payment). It is entirely up to you to donate or to keep the money that you generated in this study.
